title: viola obtusa var. obtusa
intro: Viola obtusa var. obtusa, also known as the dwarf pansy or small yellow pansy, is a type of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is native to Japan and is known for its small, yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Viola obtusa var. obtusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
